title: Mandibular advancement and retraction via bone anchoring devices
abstract: Systems, methods, devices and apparatus for mandibular advancement or retraction via bone anchoring devices are described herein. In various aspects, an apparatus for treating a patient via mandibular advancement or retraction comprises a plurality of anchoring devices positioned in the patient's intraoral cavity. Each of the plurality of anchoring devices can be positioned in bone of the patient's upper jaw or bone of the patient's lower jaw. One or more connecting structures can be removably coupled to and extend between the plurality of anchoring devices in order to displace the lower jaw anteriorly or posteriorly relative to the upper jaw.
claims: Claims CLAIMS: 1. An apparatus for treating a patient via mandibular advancement or retraction, the apparatus comprising: a plurality of anchoring devices positionable in the patient's intraoral cavity, wherein each of the plurality of anchoring devices is positionable in bone of the patient's upper jaw or bone of the patient's lower jaw; and one or more connecting structures removably couplable to and extendable between the plurality of anchoring devices in order to, when in position in the patient's intraoral cavity, displace the lower jaw anteriorly or posteriorly relative to the upper jaw. 2. The apparatus of claim 1, wherein the one or more connecting structures are arranged to, when in position in the patient's intraoral cavity, produce an anterior-posterior force component that displaces the lower jaw anteriorly or posteriorly relative to the upper jaw. 3. The apparatus of claim 2, wherein the one or more connecting structures, when in position in the patient's intraoral cavity and coupled to the plurality of anchoring devices, are capable of producing the anterior-posterior force component without producing a vertical force component. 4. The apparatus of claim 1, wherein the one or more connecting structures and the plurality of anchoring devices are arranged to, when in position in the patient's intraoral cavity, constrain vertical displacement of the lower jaw relative to the upper jaw. 5. The apparatus of claim 4, wherein the vertical displacement is constrained in order to, when in position in the patient's intraoral cavity, inhibit contact between teeth of the lower jaw and teeth of the upper jaw. 6. The apparatus of claim 1, wherein the one or more connecting structures comprise at least one elastic structure. 7. The apparatus of claim 1, wherein the one or more connecting structures are arranged to, when in position in the patient's intraoral cavity, apply a moment to at least one of the upper jaw or the lower jaw. 8. The apparatus of claim 7, wherein the one or more connecting structures comprise a connecting structure configured to support one or more of a bending load or a shear load in order to apply the moment. 9. The apparatus of claim 8, wherein the connecting structure is couplable to the upper jaw or the lower jaw via at least one anchoring device such that, when in position in the patient's intraoral cavity, rotation of the connecting structure along at least one direction of rotation is constrained in order to apply the moment at a location near the at least one anchoring device. 10. The apparatus of claim 1, wherein the plurality of anchoring devices comprises three or more anchoring devices. 1 1. A method for treating a patient via mandibular advancement or retraction, the method comprising: positioning a plurality of anchoring devices in the patient's intraoral cavity, wherein each of the plurality of anchoring devices is positioned in bone of the patient's upper jaw or bone of the patient's lower jaw; and removably coupling one or more connecting structures to the plurality of anchoring devices, wherein the one or more connecting structures extend between the plurality of anchoring devices in order to displace the lower jaw anteriorly or posteriorly relative to the upper jaw. 12. The method of claim 1 1 , wherein the one or more connecting structures are arranged to produce an anterior-posterior force component that displaces the lower jaw anteriorly or posteriorly relative to the upper jaw. 13. The method of claim 12, wherein the one or more connecting structures, when coupled to the plurality of anchoring devices, are capable of producing the anterior-posterior force component without producing a vertical force component. 14. The method of claim 1 1, wherein the one or more connecting structures and the plurality of anchoring devices are arranged to constrain vertical displacement of the lower jaw relative to the upper jaw. 15. The method of claim 14, wherein the vertical displacement is constrained in order to inhibit contact between teeth of the lower jaw and teeth of the upper jaw. 16. The method of claim 1 1, wherein the one or more connecting structures comprise at least one elastic structure. 17. The method of claim 1 1, wherein the one or more connecting structures are arranged to apply a moment to at least one of the upper jaw or the lower jaw. 18. The method of claim 17, wherein the one or more connecting structures comprise a connecting structure configured to support one or more of a bending load or a shear load in order to apply the moment. 19. The method of claim 18, wherein the connecting structure is coupled to the upper jaw or the lower jaw via at least one anchoring device that constrains rotation of the connecting structure along at least one direction of rotation in order to apply the moment at a location near the at least one anchoring device. 20. The method of claim 1 1, wherein the plurality of anchoring devices comprises three or more anchoring devices.
